widgets.title: Top Steps by Average Revisits
widgets.sql: SELECT w.workinstruction_name || ' › ' || COALESCE(s.step_name, 'Step ' || (s.step_index + 1)::text) AS label, ROUND(AVG(tv.attempts)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit tv JOIN instruction_step s ON tv.instruction_step_id = s.step_id JOIN workinstruction w ON tv.workinstruction_id = w.workinstruction_id WHERE tv.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND w.deleted_at IS NULL AND tv.attempts > 1 GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Top Steps by Total Revisit Count
widgets.sql: SELECT w.workinstruction_name || ' › ' || COALESCE(s.step_name, 'Step ' || (s.step_index + 1)::text) AS label, SUM(tv.attempts) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit tv JOIN instruction_step s ON tv.instruction_step_id = s.step_id JOIN workinstruction w ON tv.workinstruction_id = w.workinstruction_id WHERE tv.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND w.deleted_at IS NULL AND tv.attempts > 1 GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Step Revisit Detail
widgets.sql: SELECT w.workinstruction_name AS "Work Instruction", COALESCE(s.step_name, 'Step ' || (s.step_index + 1)::text) AS "Step", s.block_name AS "Block", COUNT(tv.instruction_total_visit_id) AS "Recordings", ROUND(AVG(tv.attempts)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Attempts", MAX(tv.attempts) AS "Max Attempts", SUM(tv.attempts) AS "Total Attempts" FROM instruction_total_visit tv JOIN instruction_step s ON tv.instruction_step_id = s.step_id JOIN workinstruction w ON tv.workinstruction_id = w.workinstruction_id WHERE tv.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND w.deleted_at IS NULL AND tv.attempts > 1 GROUP BY w.workinstruction_name, s.step_name, s.step_index, s.block_name ORDER BY "Avg Attempts" DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Orders Created per Week
widgets.sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(date_trunc('week', created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM product_order WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY date_trunc('week', created_at) ORDER BY date_trunc('week', created_at) ASC

widgets.title: Orders This Week
widgets.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM product_order WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)
widgets.label: Orders This Week

widgets.title: Orders Last Week
widgets.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM product_order WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 week' AND created_at < date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)
widgets.label: Orders Last Week

widgets.title: Orders per Week (Last 12 Weeks)
widgets.sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(date_trunc('week', created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM product_order WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at IS NOT NULL AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 weeks' GROUP BY date_trunc('week', created_at) ORDER BY date_trunc('week', created_at) ASC

widgets.title: Orders by Status
widgets.sql: SELECT status AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM product_order WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY status ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 6

widgets.title: Steps with Multiple Visits
widgets.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT instruction_step_id) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit WHERE attempts > 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
widgets.label: Steps with Multiple Visits

widgets.title: Avg Revisit Attempts (Multi-Visit Steps)
widgets.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(attempts)::numeric, 1) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit WHERE attempts > 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
widgets.label: Avg Revisit Attempts (Multi-Visit Steps)

widgets.title: Total Revisit Events
widgets.sql: SELECT SUM(attempts - 1) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit WHERE attempts > 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
widgets.label: Total Revisit Events

widgets.title: Work Instructions Affected
widgets.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT itv.workinstruction_id) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit itv WHERE itv.attempts > 1 AND itv.deleted_at IS NULL
widgets.label: Work Instructions Affected

widgets.title: Top Work Instructions by Total Revisits
widgets.sql: SELECT w.workinstruction_name AS label, SUM(itv.attempts - 1) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit itv JOIN workinstruction w ON w.workinstruction_id = itv.workinstruction_id WHERE itv.attempts > 1 AND itv.deleted_at IS NULL AND w.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY w.workinstruction_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Top Steps by Avg Revisit Attempts
widgets.sql: SELECT COALESCE(s.step_name, 'Step ' || s.step_index::text) AS label, ROUND(AVG(itv.attempts)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit itv JOIN instruction_step s ON s.step_id = itv.instruction_step_id WHERE itv.attempts > 1 AND itv.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY s.step_id, s.step_name, s.step_index ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Revisit Events Over Time (Monthly)
widgets.sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', created_at), 'Mon YYYY') AS label, SUM(attempts - 1) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit WHERE attempts > 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY date_trunc('month', created_at) ORDER BY date_trunc('month', created_at) ASC LIMIT 24

widgets.title: Revisit Distribution by Attempt Count
widgets.sql: SELECT attempts::text || ' attempts' AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit WHERE attempts > 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY attempts ORDER BY attempts ASC LIMIT 6

widgets.title: Most Revisited Steps — Detail
widgets.sql: SELECT w.workinstruction_name AS "Work Instruction", COALESCE(s.block_name, '—') AS "Block", COALESCE(s.step_name, 'Step ' || s.step_index::text) AS "Step", COUNT(itv.instruction_total_visit_id) AS "Recordings", SUM(itv.attempts) AS "Total Attempts", ROUND(AVG(itv.attempts)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Attempts", MAX(itv.attempts) AS "Max Attempts" FROM instruction_total_visit itv JOIN instruction_step s ON s.step_id = itv.instruction_step_id JOIN workinstruction w ON w.workinstruction_id = itv.workinstruction_id WHERE itv.attempts > 1 AND itv.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND w.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY w.workinstruction_name, s.block_name, s.step_name, s.step_index ORDER BY "Avg Attempts" DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Total Steps with Multiple Visits
widgets.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit WHERE attempts > 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
widgets.label: Total Steps with Multiple Visits

widgets.title: Avg Attempts per Revisited Step
widgets.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(attempts)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit WHERE attempts > 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
widgets.label: Avg Attempts per Revisited Step

widgets.title: Steps with Most Revisits by Work Instruction
widgets.sql: SELECT w.workinstruction_name AS "Work Instruction", s.block_name AS "Block", s.step_name AS "Step", COUNT(tv.instruction_total_visit_id) AS "Recordings Affected", ROUND(AVG(tv.attempts)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Attempts", MAX(tv.attempts) AS "Max Attempts" FROM instruction_total_visit tv JOIN instruction_step s ON tv.instruction_step_id = s.step_id JOIN workinstruction w ON tv.workinstruction_id = w.workinstruction_id WHERE tv.attempts > 1 AND tv.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND w.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY w.workinstruction_name, s.block_name, s.step_name ORDER BY "Avg Attempts" DESC, "Recordings Affected" DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Top Work Instructions by Revisited Steps
widgets.sql: SELECT w.workinstruction_name AS label, COUNT(tv.instruction_total_visit_id) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit tv JOIN workinstruction w ON tv.workinstruction_id = w.workinstruction_id WHERE tv.attempts > 1 AND tv.deleted_at IS NULL AND w.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY w.workinstruction_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Top Steps by Max Attempts
widgets.sql: SELECT COALESCE(s.step_name, 'Step ' || s.step_index::text) AS label, MAX(tv.attempts) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit tv JOIN instruction_step s ON tv.instruction_step_id = s.step_id WHERE tv.attempts > 1 AND tv.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY s.step_name, s.step_index ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Revisited Step Occurrences Over Time
widgets.sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', tv.created_at), 'Mon YYYY') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM instruction_total_visit tv WHERE tv.attempts > 1 AND tv.deleted_at IS NULL AND tv.created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY date_trunc('month', tv.created_at) ORDER BY date_trunc('month', tv.created_at) ASC LIMIT 24

widgets.title: Top Instructions by Issue Count
widgets.sql: SELECT w.workinstruction_name AS label, COUNT(i.issue_id) AS value FROM issue i JOIN workinstruction w ON i.linked_workinstruction_id = w.workinstruction_id WHERE i.deleted_at IS NULL AND w.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY w.workinstruction_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Instructions & Issue Breakdown
widgets.sql: SELECT w.workinstruction_name AS "Instruction", COUNT(i.issue_id) AS "Total Issues", SUM(CASE WHEN i.archived_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Archived", SUM(CASE WHEN i.archived_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Open", SUM(i.open_task_count) AS "Open Tasks" FROM issue i JOIN workinstruction w ON i.linked_workinstruction_id = w.workinstruction_id WHERE i.deleted_at IS NULL AND w.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY w.workinstruction_name ORDER BY "Total Issues" DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.linked_workinstruction_id) AS value FROM issue i WHERE i.linked_workinstruction_id IS NOT NULL AND i.deleted_at IS NULL

widgets.label: Total Issues Linked to Instructions

widgets.title: Operator Step Time vs. Step Average
widgets.sql:
SELECT
  s.step_name AS "Step",
  s.block_name AS "Block",
  COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name, r.executor_id) AS "Operator",
  ROUND(AVG(v.actual_duration) / 1000.0) AS "Avg Time (s)",
  ROUND(AVG(AVG(v.actual_duration)) OVER (PARTITION BY v.instruction_step_id) / 1000.0) AS "Step Avg (s)",
  ROUND(
    (AVG(v.actual_duration) - AVG(AVG(v.actual_duration)) OVER (PARTITION BY v.instruction_step_id))
    / NULLIF(AVG(AVG(v.actual_duration)) OVER (PARTITION BY v.instruction_step_id), 0) * 100
  ) AS "Delta (%)"
FROM instruction_visit v
JOIN recording r ON r.recording_id = v.recording_id
JOIN instruction_step s ON s.step_id = v.instruction_step_id
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = r.executor_id
WHERE
  v.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND v.actual_duration IS NOT NULL
  AND v.actual_duration > 0
  AND r.executor_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  v.instruction_step_id,
  s.step_name,
  s.block_name,
  r.executor_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY "Delta (%)" DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

widgets.title: Active Operators This Week
widgets.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT executor_id) AS value FROM recording WHERE executor_id IS NOT NULL AND started_at >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE) AND deleted_at IS NULL
widgets.label: Active Operators This Week
